claim_text: Ensembling likely improved SWE-bench performance under unstable rollout conditions.
mechanism_text: If repeated agent rollouts vary materially across sampled tasks, aggregating or selecting across candidates can raise observed benchmark success by reducing exposure to single-run variance.
bounds: This is a reported internal attribution, not a clean ablation; the source does not separately prove how much gain came from ensembling versus inferred planning or other implementation choices.
